TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jamison_Brewer, title = Jamison_Brewer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jamison_Brewer} }

S.FORM: Jamison Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Jamison Brewer, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jamison Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Jamison Brewer, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *amis~ɕon βrewer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *amis~ɕon βrewer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
